Class LegoProtocolConstants

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
public final class LegoProtocolConstants extends Object
Constants for the LEGO Wireless Protocol 3.0 (LWP3).

All UUIDs are normalised to lower-case. All byte values are expressed as int to avoid sign-extension issues when combining with bitwise operations.

Reference: LEGO BLE Wireless Protocol 3.0 specification

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    DEVICE_2PORT_HANDSET
    Device: 2-Port Handset (SSS=010, DDDDD=00010).
    static final int
    DEVICE_2PORT_HUB
    Device: 2-Port Hub (SSS=010, DDDDD=00001).
    static final int
    DEVICE_BOOST_HUB
    Device: Boost Move Hub (SSS=010, DDDDD=00000).
    static final int
    DEVICE_DUPLO_TRAIN
    Device: Duplo Train (SSS=001, DDDDD=00000).
    static final int
    DEVICE_WEDO2_HUB
    Device: WeDo 2.0 Hub (SSS=000, DDDDD=00000).
    static final int
    HUB_ACTION_DISCONNECT
    Hub action: Disconnect.
    static final int
    HUB_ACTION_SWITCH_OFF
    Hub action: Switch off hub.
    static final int
    HUB_ACTION_VCC_PORT_OFF
    Hub action: VCC port control off.
    static final int
    HUB_ACTION_VCC_PORT_ON
    Hub action: VCC port control on.
    static final int
    HUB_ACTION_WILL_DISCONNECT
    Hub action (upstream): hub will disconnect.
    static final int
    HUB_ACTION_WILL_GO_BOOT
    Hub action (upstream): hub will go into boot mode.
    static final int
    HUB_ACTION_WILL_SWITCH_OFF
    Hub action (upstream): hub will switch off.

    HUB_ALERT_HIGH_CURRENT
    Alert type: High current.

    HUB_ALERT_LOW_SIGNAL
    Alert type: Low signal strength.

    HUB_ALERT_LOW_VOLTAGE
    Alert type: Low voltage.
    static final int
    HUB_ALERT_OP_DISABLE_UPDATES
    Alert operation: Disable updates.
    static final int
    HUB_ALERT_OP_ENABLE_UPDATES
    Alert operation: Enable updates.
    static final int
    HUB_ALERT_OP_REQUEST_UPDATE
    Alert operation: Request update.
    static final int
    HUB_ALERT_OP_UPDATE
    Alert operation: Update notification (upstream, 1-byte payload).
    static final int
    HUB_ALERT_OVER_POWER
    Alert type: Over power condition.
    static final String
    HUB_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
    128-bit UUID of the LEGO Hub GATT characteristic.
    static final int
    HUB_ID
    Hub ID field value — always 0x00 (reserved).
    static final int
    HUB_PROP_ADVERTISING_NAME
    Hub property: Advertising Name.
    static final int
    HUB_PROP_BATTERY_TYPE
    Hub property: Battery Type.
    static final int

    Hub property: Battery Voltage (%).

    Hub property: Button state.

    HUB_PROP_HW_VERSION

    HUB_PROP_OP_DISABLE_UPDATES
    Property operation: Disable updates (unsubscribe).
    static final int
    HUB_PROP_OP_ENABLE_UPDATES
    Property operation: Enable updates (subscribe).
    static final int
    HUB_PROP_OP_REQUEST_UPDATE
    Property operation: Request current value.
    static final int
    HUB_PROP_OP_RESET
    Property operation: Reset to default.
    static final int
    HUB_PROP_OP_SET
    Property operation: Set value.
    static final int
    HUB_PROP_OP_UPDATE
    Property operation: Value update notification (upstream).

    HUB_PROP_PRIMARY_MAC
    Hub property: Primary MAC Address.
    static final int
    HUB_PROP_RSSI
    Hub property: RSSI.
    static final int
    HUB_PROP_SYSTEM_TYPE_ID
    Hub property: System Type ID.
    static final String
    HUB_SERVICE_UUID
    128-bit UUID of the LEGO Hub GATT service.
    static final int
    LENGTH_TWO_BYTE_FLAG
    Bit mask applied to the first length byte to detect two-byte encoding.
    static final int
    MANUFACTURER_DATA_LENGTH
    Length of the manufacturer-specific advertisement data payload in bytes.
    static final int
    MANUFACTURER_ID
    BLE manufacturer ID for LEGO System A/S (little-endian: 0x0397).
    static final int
    MOTOR_CMD_GOTO_ABSOLUTE_POSITION
    Motor sub-command: GotoAbsolutePosition.
    static final int
    MOTOR_CMD_GOTO_ABSOLUTE_POSITION2
    Motor sub-command: GotoAbsolutePosition2.

    MOTOR_CMD_SET_ACC_TIME
    Motor sub-command: SetAccTime (acceleration ramp time).
    static final int
    MOTOR_CMD_SET_DEC_TIME
    Motor sub-command: SetDecTime (deceleration ramp time).

    Motor sub-command: WriteDirect.

    • HUB_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID

      public static final String HUB_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID
      128-bit UUID of the LEGO Hub GATT characteristic.

      Supports Write Without Response (or Write With Response on iOS) and Notify. All upstream and downstream messages use this single characteristic.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEVICE_BOOST_HUB

      public static final int DEVICE_BOOST_HUB
      Device: Boost Move Hub (SSS=010, DDDDD=00000).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEVICE_2PORT_HUB

      public static final int DEVICE_2PORT_HUB
      Device: 2-Port Hub (SSS=010, DDDDD=00001).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEVICE_2PORT_HANDSET

      public static final int DEVICE_2PORT_HANDSET
      Device: 2-Port Handset (SSS=010, DDDDD=00010).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • HUB_ID

      public static final int HUB_ID
      Hub ID field value — always 0x00 (reserved).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • LENGTH_TWO_BYTE_FLAG

      public static final int LENGTH_TWO_BYTE_FLAG
      Bit mask applied to the first length byte to detect two-byte encoding. If bit 7 is set the length occupies two bytes.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
